name: nox-mem-latency-bench
description: Latency benchmark harness — p50/p95/p99 for hybrid search + ingest

scripts.dry-run: npm run build && node dist/runner.js --workload search.short --n 10 --warmup 0 --output dry-run-sample.json
scripts.bench:all: npm run build && node dist/runner.js --all --output results/full-run.json
